title: misprint
overview: Nina wakes up on board the spacecraft in her newly printed body. Shortly after greeting other crew members, they are met with a devastating challenge.

title: hunger
overview: While searching for Lewis, the crew uncovers a clue that reveals an unexpected side to him. Patty struggles to come to terms with the team consensus.

title: contact
overview: Nina comes up with an alternative plan to bringing Lewis back. Oscar finds himself in deep trouble when he tries to repair part of the ship.

title: collusion
overview: Hiding away from the others, the misprinted Lewis attempts to proclaim his innocence to his reprinted self.

title: investigation
overview: The two Lewises unlock vital clues that help narrow down the traitor. Meanwhile, Patty and Mack hatch a plan to get the group out of confinement.

title: betrayal
overview: Mack returns from the Womb with a clean slate. A seemingly peaceful game of cards goes haywire when Nina suddenly acts out of character.

title: survival
overview: As Patty's true intentions quickly unravel, the crew becomes increasingly divided with everything at stake.

title: gravitation
overview: While Mack attempts to dismantle the RA bomb, the rest of the crew fight for their lives as the ship quickly disintegrates.
